entities.name: SADCC/ICRISAT REGIONAL GROUNDNUT IMPROVEMENT PROGRAM
entities.description: A regional program established to improve groundnut crops in Southern Africa

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The agricultural crop targeted for improvement by the regional program

entities.name: CHITEDZE RESEARCH STATION
entities.description: The research facility where the regional groundnut improvement program was established

entities.name: LILONGWE
entities.description: The city near the Chitedze Research Station

entities.name: MALAWI
entities.description: The country where the Chitedze Research Station is located

entities.name: SADCC
entities.description: The Southern African Development Coordination Conference

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics

entities.name: LUSAKA SUMMIT CONFERENCE
entities.description: The 1980 conference where the invitation to establish the program was made

entities.name: SADCC CONSULTATIVE TECHNICAL COMMITTEE FOR AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH
entities.description: The committee that approved the subsuming of the program in 1984
